name: Oklahoma Construction Industries Board License Searches
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official CIB lookup pages before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Oklahoma CIB registered roofing contractor records and building/home inspector, electrical, mechanical, and plumbing licensee records exposed by official lookup links
knownExclusions: General contractor licensing and local permits may be handled locally and are outside this source entry unless CIB-specific.
The CIB site links multiple searches; future adapter work may need separate source entries or per-search filters.
Search result fields, historical coverage, and bulk access have not been modeled.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Future access should prefer stable official exports or APIs if discovered.
publicRecordsNotes: Official CIB lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, registration, or local authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Oklahoma CIB lookup links. Future work should decide whether roofing and trade-license searches become separate sources.
maintainerNotes: Keep CIB source scope separate from local Oklahoma contractor licensing.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

blocker.summary: No stable, documented machine-readable official interface is currently suitable for an offline-tested adapter.
